DISCOVERY 302,PLAINTIFF NICOLE ARRINGTON'S MOTION COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FIRST SET OF REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE COURT SUSTAINED DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO EACH DOCUMENT CATAGORY. THE DEFENDANT AGREED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN ITS RESPONSE WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS. THE PLAINTIFF MAY SERVE A SECOND DOCUMENT REQUEST WHICH PROVIDES SPECIFIC DETAIL OF THE DOCUMENTS REQUESTED TO BE PRODUCED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER. PARTIES TO CONTINUE THE MEET AND CONFER PROCESS TO NARROW AND SPECIFY DOCUMENTS. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK K. LIU, CSR ANGELA POURTABIB 855-348-4997. (D302)

Notice Of Taking Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance And Production Of Documents Of Defendant General Motors Llcs Person(S) Most Knowledgeable And Custodian(S) Of Records Off Calendar
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant, And Request For Sanctions First Set Of Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Natalee RT. Fisher of Knight Law Group LLP 310-552-2250 ext 328. appeared for plaintiff. / Atty. Jonathan M. Shugart of Erskine Law 949-777-6032 appeared for defendant.

Argued - The Court rules, PLAINTIFF NICOLE ARRINGTON's Motion Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant, And Request For Sanctions First Set Of Request For Production Of Documents. The Court sustained defendant's objection to each document catagory. The defendant agreed to produce documents identified in its response within fifteen days. The plaintiff may serve a second document request which provides specific detail of the documents requested to be produced. Defendant to prepare order. Parties to continue the meet and confer process to narrow and specify documents. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, CSR Angela Pourtabib 855-348-4997. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
